title: 10 best herbal tinctures for toothache
description: Tasmanian blue gum tinctures helps with toothache because of its potent analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties. The tincture's active compounds, such as eucalyptol and cineole, work synergistically to numb the pain and reduce swelling in the affected area. As a natural antibacterial agent, it also combats underlying infections that may be contributing to the toothache.
